note: Discovery only. Ideas + which primary sources to chase. Write original from primary sources; never republish.

leads.title: Marc Grondahl Remembered as Industry Trailblazer, Role Model & Friend
leads.summary: The co-founder of Planet Fitness, Marc Grondahl leaves behind an impressive legacy he helped build alongside his brother, Michael.

leads.title: Fitness Stakeholders Say All-in-One Software Isn’t Enough Anymore
leads.summary: Industry leaders tend to agree that more flexible software systems, primarily those with open APIs, create the greater advantage in today's fitness landscape

leads.title: Touch-Therapy Wearable Helps People Sleep Better, Oura-Affiliated Study Finds
leads.summary: A peer-reviewed study analyzing nearly 475,000 nights of sleep found that Apollo Neuro wearable users gained an average of 46 extra minutes of sleep per night, and slept better and deper thanks to the wearable's AI-powered vibration tech

leads.title: ATN Week in Review: What’s Next for Planet Fitness?
leads.summary: A lawsuit alleging Planet Fitness botched a recent strength-training marketing campaign is highly important for the gym giant, regardless of the ultimate outcome of the case

leads.title: Bodybar Pilates Enters New Markets, Nears 100 Studios
leads.summary: The Texas-based reformer Pilates franchise is entering New Hampshire, growing in North Carolina and adding three studios in San Antonio as it targets 30 openings this year

leads.title: BFT Positions New Fitness Competition as Revenue Channel for Franchisees
leads.summary: Dubbed “Podium,” the new series lets BFT franchisees keep 100% of ticket sales while giving current members a new reason to stay and prospective new members a way to become acquainted with the boutique fitness brand

leads.title: The Pearl Wellness Club Wants to Be a Third Space for NYC’s Women & Girls
leads.summary: At The Pearl, working women take meetings and Pilates classes down the hall from their daughters' dance lessons. Founder Marcella Hymowitz spoke to ATN about what makes the concept special

leads.title: Supernatural VR’s Comeback Could Be the Strongest Case Yet for People Over Tech
leads.summary: The VR fitness community rallied when Meta pulled back on Supernatural. Now the app’s coaches are reuniting with fans in person before an independent relaunch this fall

leads.title: From Reactive to Proactive: How Agentic AI is Reshaping Fitness
leads.summary: With the introduction of its AI-powered operating infrastructure, ABC Fitness is embedding intelligence across operations to automate workflows, personalize experiences and integrate across systems.

leads.title: Tony Hawk’s Latest Trick? Supplements & ‘Glorious Naps’
leads.summary: The skateboarding legend spoke to ATN about his new recovery philosophy and partnership with Qunol's Move Like a Champion campaign — proof that even a sport built on "walk it off" is catching up to wellness culture

leads.title: Playlist & EGYM’s $7.5B Deal Could Prescribe Fitness
leads.summary: The leaders of Playlist, EGYM and L Catterton discussed fitness tech's biggest merger, and why they have their sights set on an even larger market: healthcare

leads.title: EoS Fitness Opens 9 Gyms in Q2, Continues Texas Expansion
leads.summary: The fast-growing HVLP gym chain also signed nine new leases during the quarter, bringing its pipeline to more than 225 locations open or in development

leads.title: Pvolve Reaches 40 Open Studios, Signs New Franchise Agreements
leads.summary: The Jennifer Aniston-affiliated boutique fitness brand continues to expand across the U.S., opening new studios in Seattle and Portland while signing franchise agreements in Pittsburgh and Albuquerque

leads.title: Around 2 Hours of Weekly Strength Training Is Best for Longevity, Study Finds
leads.summary: A 30-year study indicates that weekly strength training for 90 to 120 minutes has serious benefits for lowering risk of death, with no further benefit found above that duration

leads.title: Fitness Connection Pours $10M Into Club Upgrades Across Texas
leads.summary: The Texas-founded operator has transformed three Fitness Connection locations with expanded strength areas, upgraded cardio and sought-after recovery amenities as competition to meet growing member expectations intensifies

leads.title: ATN Insights: On-Demand Videos Drive Momentum at Gyms, Not Just at Home
leads.summary: The Health & Fitness Association noted that creating two meaningful interactions a month with each member can reduce cancellations by up to 33%

leads.title: Planet Fitness Admits Its Strength Pivot Went Too Far. Now a Suit Alleges It Misled Investors
leads.summary: Planet Fitness' recent strength training-focused marketing campaign was meant to fuel membership growth but intimidated core customers instead, according to a new lawsuit

leads.title: Hyrox Expands Global Race Calendar, Plans More Multi-Week Events
leads.summary: The fitness racing giant expects more than two million athletes this season, adding new host cities and extending select events to as many as 10 days to keep pace with growth

leads.title: Les Mills Launches First-Ever Reformer Pilates Program
leads.summary: The group fitness giant is bringing its signature music-driven approach to reformer Pilates, getting in on the industry's fastest-growing modality

leads.title: Luxury Gyms, Wellness Clubs Dominate NYC Retail Leasing Activity
leads.summary: High-end fitness operators claimed four of the ten largest retail leases in New York City in 2025, with major gym deals taking the two top spots

leads.title: The Perfect Off-Road Tire For Crosstrek, CRV, and RAV4 Owners
leads.summary: BF Goodrich’s new Trail-Terrain T/A + is specifically designed for crossovers. The post The Perfect Off-Road Tire For Crosstrek, CRV, and RAV4 Owners appeared first on Outside Online .

leads.title: He Designs Shoes During the Week and Dominates Pro Ultramarathons on Weekends
leads.summary: Vincent Bouillard, a product designer for shoe brand Hoka, is quietly crushing the fields at the world’s top ultramarathons. His recent win at California’s Western States Endurance Run confirmed his place as the sport’s newest star. The post He Designs Shoes During the Week and D

leads.title: Fridge the Cat Survived 39 Days After Vanishing Near Great Sand Dunes National Park
leads.summary: After escaping a campsite near Great Sand Dunes National Park, Fridge the cat endured predators and extreme heat before a miraculous rescue. Here is how she beat the odds. The post Fridge the Cat Survived 39 Days After Vanishing Near Great Sand Dunes National Park appeared first

leads.title: Inside ‘The Odyssey’s’ Epic Real-World Filming Locations
leads.summary: 'The Odyssey' was shot on location in remote destinations across six countries from Iceland to Greece. We talk to a film production manager to learn more about how this epic film was brought to life. Plus, how you can visit the real-world landscapes that pushed the star-studded c

leads.title: Dermatologists Debunk All Those Sunscreen Rumors You’ve Seen on Social Media
leads.summary: A recent study found that social media spreads sunscreen misinformation. Dermatologists debunk the top sunscreen myths. The post Dermatologists Debunk All Those Sunscreen Rumors You’ve Seen on Social Media appeared first on Outside Online .
